productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Check Grey Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into pair of striped socks from united colors of benetton. A glimpse of this sock from beneath a rolled up pair of jeans add a hint of eccentricity to your classic style. Made of 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastaneGrey with diamond pattern on the leg regionSoft and padded footbed Flattened seams for abrasion-free comfort Softly elasticated mouth Sock careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
